svg.title: EduPilot — Full Production Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture diagram showing frontend, AI layer, backend, and data layers of EduPilot platform

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the EduPilot frontend tech stack')
sendPrompt('How does the Spline 3D integration work in EduPilot?')
sendPrompt('What does the EduPilot API gateway do?')
g.text: REST + WebSocket · Auth middleware · Rate limiting · CORS

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Claude AI mentor work in EduPilot?')
sendPrompt('Explain the EduPilot recommendation engine logic')
sendPrompt('How does the admission probability predictor work?')
sendPrompt('What does the user profile service manage?')
sendPrompt('How does the loan funnel work in EduPilot?')
sendPrompt('How does the notification service work?')
sendPrompt('How does the gamification engine work?')
sendPrompt('What does Supabase store for EduPilot?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the vector DB for EduPilot?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis cache in EduPilot?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the EduPilot CI/CD pipeline')
sendPrompt('Tell me about Railway backend deployment')
sendPrompt('What monitoring tools does EduPilot use?')

svg.text: Frontend: Next.js 14 · TypeScript · Tailwind · Framer Motion · Spline
AI: Claude API · Custom prompt chains · RAG pipeline
